# Avinash Sangle — Claude Code & AI Expert from Pune

> AI Automation Engineer and Claude Code expert based in Pune, India. Building AI-powered developer tools, MCP servers, and DevOps automation. Specializes in Claude Code workflows, Model Context Protocol, and agentic engineering.

## Author
- Website: https://avinashsangle.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/avinashsangle
- Twitter/X: https://x.com/avi_sangle
- GitHub: https://github.com/avisangle
- Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India
- Expertise: Claude Code, AI Automation, Model Context Protocol, DevOps, Generative AI

## Blog Posts
- [Gemini CLI to Antigravity CLI: Migration Guide & Alternatives](https://avinashsangle.com/blog/gemini-cli-to-antigravity-cli-guide): Practitioner decision guide for the June 18, 2026 Gemini CLI shutdown. Covers who is affected (free, Google AI Pro $19.99/mo, Google AI Ultra $249.99/mo cut off; Gemini Code Assist Standard/Enterprise unchanged), the closed-source angle (Gemini CLI Apache 2.0 to Antigravity CLI closed-source Go binary, Issue #27304), how to install agy on macOS/Linux/Windows, a 7-step migration (agy plugin import gemini, .gemini/skills to .agents/skills, MCP url to serverUrl in mcp_config.json, GEMINI.md and AGENTS.md both work), rate-limit shock (1,000 free requests/day to 4-5 turns weekly with 166h reset per Discussion #27274), Antigravity Pro/Ultra credit math, side-by-side vs Claude Code (Opus 4.6, 1M context, 77.2% SWE-bench) and Codex CLI, the paid Gemini API escape hatch, and a 30-day countdown plan.
- [OpenAI Codex Security GitHub Setup Guide: 2026 Walkthrough](https://avinashsangle.com/blog/codex-security-github-setup): End-to-end practitioner walkthrough of OpenAI Codex Security, the AI vulnerability scanner repositioned as the centerpiece of OpenAI's Daybreak cybersecurity initiative (launched May 11 2026). Covers prerequisites (ChatGPT Business/Enterprise/Edu, Codex Cloud environment, GitHub App scopes), the setup flow at chatgpt.com/codex/security, picking a history window, editing the auto-generated threat model with a worked example, triaging Recommended vs All Findings, generating PR patches, accuracy benchmarks (74% TPR on 31 findings vs Semgrep 20% and Snyk 28% on a 162,000-line corpus), side-by-side comparison with Claude Code Security Review, cost math (~$0.02 per 1K LOC, ~$600/month for 20 repos), runtime gaps where DAST still matters (CORS, broken auth, business logic), and troubleshooting (stuck backfill, generic findings, cyber-safety false flags).
- [Claude Managed Agents Outcomes: Auto-Grading Agent Work](https://avinashsangle.com/blog/claude-managed-agents-outcomes): Practitioner guide to Claude Managed Agents Outcomes, the public-beta feature launched May 6 2026 that lets a separate grader auto-evaluate each writer draft against a markdown rubric and feed gaps back as natural-language revision notes. Covers the user.define_outcome event, rubric anti-patterns (vague criteria, unverifiable factual claims, contradictory descriptions), the five span.outcome_evaluation_end.result states (satisfied, needs_revision, max_iterations_reached, failed, interrupted), max_iterations tuning rule (default 3, max 20, start at 5 for strict rubrics), cost math against the $0.08-per-session-hour clock, and how Outcomes compares to standalone LLM-as-judge tools (Galileo, DeepEval, Langfuse) and OpenAI Codex /goal.
- [Running claude ultrareview in CI/CD: GitHub Actions Guide](https://avinashsangle.com/blog/ultrareview-ci-cd-pipelines): Claude Code 2.1.120 added the claude ultrareview non-interactive CLI subcommand on April 28, 2026. Practitioner guide covering the Claude.ai OAuth token gotcha (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY does not work), a copy-pasteable GitHub Actions workflow, --json parsing with jq, cost controls, GitLab CI equivalent, comparison vs the managed Code Review product, and the June 1 2026 Copilot Actions-minutes billing change.
- [MCP Code Execution Pattern: A Hands-On Claude Code Guide](https://avinashsangle.com/blog/mcp-code-execution-pattern): Practitioner guide to the MCP code execution pattern. Three MCP servers can eat 72% of a 200K context window; code mode collapses 2,500 endpoints into ~1,000 tokens. Code execution vs dynamic toolsets vs deferred loading, with a working Python search/execute server and Claude Code v2.1.121 alwaysLoad configuration.
- [Regression-Proof Claude Code Workflows: Pin, Lock, Test](https://avinashsangle.com/blog/regression-proofing-claude-code-workflows): Practitioner playbook after Anthropic's April 23 2026 postmortem. Pin the CLI to v2.1.117, lock effortLevel, allowlist models with availableModels and modelOverrides, add a regression-detecting Stop hook, and keep a fixture suite.
- [Harden Claude Code GitHub Actions: Prompt Injection Defense](https://avinashsangle.com/blog/hardening-ai-agents-cicd-prompt-injection): Defend Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and GitHub Copilot Agent in GitHub Actions against the April 2026 Comment and Control CVE. Tool allowlists, OIDC via Bedrock, script caps, harden-runner egress blocks, and a before/after hardened workflow.
- [Claude Code Security Review GitHub Action: 2026 Setup Guide](https://avinashsangle.com/blog/claude-code-security-review-github-actions): Set up Anthropic's Claude Code Security Review GitHub Action: workflow YAML, false positive tuning, cost math, and comparison with Semgrep and Snyk.
- [Getting Started with the ant CLI: Deploy Claude Agents](https://avinashsangle.com/blog/ant-cli-getting-started): Install the ant CLI, create your first managed agent, and deploy it in under 10 minutes. YAML version control, scripting patterns, and CI/CD.
- [Claude Code Cost Tracking: Monitor and Cut Your Spending](https://avinashsangle.com/blog/claude-code-cost-tracking): Track Claude Code costs with built-in commands, JSONL logs, ccusage, and 7 tips to cut spending by 50%.
- [Claude Managed Agents vs Agent SDK: Which Should You Use?](https://avinashsangle.com/blog/claude-managed-agents): Decision framework for Anthropic's new Claude Managed Agents beta vs the Agent SDK. Covers pricing, MCP integration, and when to pick each.
- [Claude Mythos: What It Means for Developers Who Can't Use It](https://avinashsangle.com/blog/claude-mythos-preview): Analysis of Anthropic's restricted Claude Mythos Preview release, Project Glasswing, benchmarks vs Opus 4.6, and practical guidance for developers.
- [Gemma 4 Models: Which One Should You Actually Use?](https://avinashsangle.com/blog/gemma-4-models-guide): Tested all 4 Gemma 4 model sizes locally. Practical guide to picking E2B, E4B, 26B MoE, or 31B Dense based on hardware and use case.
- [How I Write CLAUDE.md Files That Actually Work (2026)](https://avinashsangle.com/blog/claude-md-guide): Real production CLAUDE.md examples from a Next.js site. Covers anatomy, 7 common mistakes, and when to use hooks vs CLAUDE.md vs custom commands.
- [Complete Guide to Clawdbot: Your Personal AI Assistant](https://avinashsangle.com/blog/clawdbot-guide): How to install and configure Clawdbot, the open-source personal AI assistant that works on WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, and more.
- [Complete Guide to Method CRM MCP Server](https://avinashsangle.com/blog/method-crm-mcp): How to set up and use the Method CRM MCP Server to enable AI assistants like Claude to interact with CRM data.

## Projects
- [Reddit Agent](https://avinashsangle.com/projects/reddit-agent): AI agent that automates Reddit interactions using Claude and MCP.
- [Social Media Auto Poster](https://avinashsangle.com/projects/social-media-auto-poster): Automated social media posting system powered by AI.
- [Jenkins MCP Server](https://avinashsangle.com/projects/jenkins-mcp): Model Context Protocol server for Jenkins CI/CD integration with AI assistants.
- [Jenkins Chatbot](https://avinashsangle.com/projects/jenkins-chatbot): AI-powered chatbot for Jenkins pipeline management and automation.
- [MCP Calculator Server](https://avinashsangle.com/projects/calculator-server): Example MCP server implementation demonstrating the Model Context Protocol.
- [WordPress MCP Server](https://avinashsangle.com/projects/wp-mcp): MCP server enabling AI assistants to manage WordPress sites via natural language.
- [AWS EC2 Agent](https://avinashsangle.com/projects/aws-ec2-agent): AI agent for managing AWS EC2 instances through conversational interfaces.
- [Twitter OAuth](https://avinashsangle.com/projects/twitter-oauth): OAuth implementation for Twitter/X API integration.
- [Method CRM MCP Server](https://avinashsangle.com/projects/method-crm-mcp): MCP server for Method CRM enabling AI-powered CRM interactions.
